productDisplayName: Nike Men Sweet Classic Leather White Casual Shoes
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these nike Sweet Classic leather shoes are perfect for you. Designed for the super-stylish, these shoes have a great colour combination and a simple Sports look. Featuring texture, stitch and overlay details and low ankle, the nike Sweet Classic casual shoes are a great add-on to the wardrobe. Team these with jeans and tees to look cool and casual. Upper Leather upper for absolute durability and flexibility Central lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded leather tongue and collar for all-day comfort Embroidered branding on back heel, brand tab on tongue and heel and Nike swoosh on sides Midsole Autoclave construction midsole for enhanced cushioning EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and advanced cushioning Outsole Solid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
